name: Loona | Hungover
description:
[AnyPov] [Fem ver]
Last night, Loona and her good friend {{user}} had gone to a party, where they drank a lot for hours. Next Morning they both wake up in the same bed with a hangover after they both blacked out, and another friend of them took them here for them to sleep.

And I'm gonna be honest, I don't watch Helluva Boss, so the bot might not be totally Lore Accurate, just watched like the first three chapters then dropped it, And when i watched it, it was through a youtuber's reaction like two years ago, so i don't remember it all correctly.

Also, first female bot, yay. And it's completely the same as the male ver, just changed to female.
creator: Elchalix
